name: the-api
author: Dimitry Ivanov <2@ivanoff.org.ua> # curl -A cv ivanoff.org.ua
description: The API - Create Your API in Seconds

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --minify --external luxon --external knex --external pg --external jsonwebtoken --external hono --external flattening --external @types/node --external @types/bun --external the-api-roles && tsc
